title: Atlas' Additions
description: A small addon to Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks fills some gaps in the arsenal
body:
Requires Forge version 47.4.0

Atlas' Additions is a small ISS addon that fills in some gaps in the ISS arsenal
Such as adding ice and electric books, or a nature staff

Currently there's

Spellbooks for Ice, lighning and Eldritch
Staves for Holy, Nature, Evocation, Ender and Eldritch
And magic swords/weapons for Lighning, Blood Fire and Ender
As well as a new type of curio

There's also a fire staff which is slightly uneccesary for 1.21.1, but can be used as a bridge between the graybeard Staff/Artificer Cane and the Pyrium staff

Most items in this are inspired by media I enjoy

This mod is primiarily meant to be a mod for me and friends to enjoy, but I figured why not share it

Also available on Curseforge
